_meta.author: Claude (Adam-supervised)
_meta.note: FXBG School Board (6) + 2 former council members. Roster verified June 2026 (2026 officers: Chair Pomeroy, Vice Chair McFadden). FXBG City Schools handles transgender students case-by-case with NO formal parental-notification policy and did NOT adopt the conservative VDOE 2023 model policies or remove library books (those actions were in neighboring Spotsylvania/Stafford/Frederick/King George). Board's documented work centers on academics, special ed, transportation. Light, honest finalization: schema-complete (adds v5.0 local categories), one documented board-posture cell scored for incumbents, new members left null pending a voting record.

profile.background: Fredericksburg City School Board, Ward 2 (re-elected Nov 2025, 96.7%). Elected Board CHAIR for 2026 (5-0). Incumbent through the period the division maintained a case-by-case approach to transgender students with no formal parental-notification policy.

Board's documented work is academics/special-ed/transportation; no individual culture-war votes found, so other cells null.
